text: Decide remote-vs-attend feasibility for BuilderShip given SF-Bay-local preference
description: HUMAN DECISION. The finale (June 14 yacht, SF Bay) prefers local participants; we're in Germany on short notice. Decide explicitly: (a) remote build + public-showcase only, (b) actually travel/attend, or (c) skip the event and keep only the demo+visibility artifacts. Recommendation: (a) — capture the durable value (demo + tagged post) without committing to travel. Resolve this before investing in anything that only pays off by physically attending.

status.comment: Felix to decide remote-only vs attend vs skip. Recommendation: remote-only (demo + visibility).
